statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: Using Registry Values to Enable and Disable Task Offloading
links.summary: Microsoft documents DisableTaskOffload under HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\TCPIP\Parameters, with 1 disabling task offloads and 0 enabling them.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: Multimedia Class Scheduler Service
links.summary: Microsoft documents SystemResponsiveness under the SystemProfile key and explains how the value is rounded and clamped.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider writes DisableTaskOffload = 0, NetworkThrottlingIndex = 0xFFFFFFFF, and SystemResponsiveness = 10.

links.title: Repo power notes
links.summary: The repo tracks these values as power and network tuning observations, but this review did not elevate NetworkThrottlingIndex to a primary-source-backed Windows control.
